data.name: 極道無頼:橫濱按摩店篇
data.detailed_description:
這是一款帶有幽默元素的情色模擬遊戲。
遊戲主人公森村浩太被安排經營一家古法按摩店，需要在指定期限內賺到足夠的錢完成黑道晉升任務。
同時他還要抽空和多位女性保持複雜的情感關係。
最終結局如何，全憑玩家的模擬經營實力和戀愛技巧了！
玩家需要模擬經營一家泰式古法按摩店，賺取足夠的金錢完成晉升，你也可以在閒暇之餘與店裏的顧客建立情感關係，與她們約會。
經營面臨的挑戰除了獲取客源以外，培訓員工也是非常重要的事情！
data.about_the_game:
這是一款帶有幽默元素的情色模擬遊戲。
遊戲主人公森村浩太被安排經營一家古法按摩店，需要在指定期限內賺到足夠的錢完成黑道晉升任務。

data.short_description: 這是一個擁有豐富情色要素的模擬經營類遊戲。 主角是一個黑社會成員，目前面臨晉升考驗，在30天內賺夠1000萬日元。 玩家將在白天管理經營按摩店，夜晚走上街頭拉客宣傳。 當然你也可以選擇在夜晚時間放鬆一下和其他女主角約會。 遊戲的主要遊玩形式為模擬經營以及用彈珠戰鬥。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文

data.name: Yakuza Rogue: Yokohama massage parlor chapter
data.detailed_description:
This is an erotic simulation game with elements of humor. The protagonist, Kouta Morimura, is tasked with managing an old-fashioned massage parlor and must earn enough money within a set deadline to complete a promotion task for the underworld. At the same time, he must also find time to maintain complex emotional relationships with several women. How the story ends depends entirely on the player's management skills and romantic prowess!
Players need to simulate managing a traditional Thai massage parlor, earning enough money to achieve promotions. In your spare time, you can also establish emotional relationships with customers in the shop and go on dates with them.
Besides acquiring customers, another significant challenge in management is training employees!

data.short_description: This is a simulation game with strong erotic elements. You play as an underworld member aiming to earn 10 million yen in 30 days for a promotion. Manage a massage parlor by day, promote it at night, and date other characters. Gameplay includes parlor management and pinball battles.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
